message:
fix(runtime): record slowlog for runtime-special commands like Redis call()

Refactor the special command dispatch to capture return values instead of
returning immediately, then measure elapsed time and call record_slowlog()
before returning. This ensures commands like ACL, CONFIG, CLIENT, CLUSTER,
pub/sub, MULTI/EXEC, SELECT, and all other runtime-special commands are
properly recorded in SLOWLOG when they exceed the configured threshold.

Update the slowlog test to expect 13 entries instead of 12, since
SLOWLOG GET itself is now also recorded when the threshold is 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
